task_description: Implement Gate 0 for GRID: restructure from monolithic Painkiller app to modular Split-APK architecture. Rename to GRID, introduce Module Registry + Crash Boundary + Config Loader in :shared, create :feature:import dynamic feature module, move all feature code from :app to :feature:import, leave :app as pure shell.

verification.summary: No Android SDK available in sandbox. Cannot run Gradle builds or tests. Verified structurally. Review issues addressed: (1) TemplateRegistry.replaceAll now uses atomic volatile reference swap, (2) ModuleRegistry exposes StateFlow for reactive Compose observation, (3) GridNavGraph uses collectAsState for reactive UI, (4) ServiceLoader-based feature module discovery wired in GridApplication.onCreate(), (5) ConfigLoader returns Result<Int> instead of silently ignoring failures. Added tests: TemplateRegistryTest (5 cases incl. concurrency), ConfigLoaderTest (4 cases), ModuleRegistryStateFlowTest (5 cases). Issue #5 (XML resource rename) deferred as cosmetic and functional.
